title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Metropolis Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Metropolis Healthcare in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Metropolis Healthcare:
Metropolis Healthcare is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metropolis Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
